---
title: "Team Update"
format:
  revealjs:
    slide-number: true
editor: visual
---

## Overview

- This slide deck should only reference exported plots from `outputs/`.
- Keep data manipulation and plot generation in `notebooks/`.

## Example Figure

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| results: asis

knitr::include_graphics(here::here("outputs", "plot_example.png"))
```

## Notes

- Replace the example file with real exported plots.
- Add one slide per figure or per message.
